observation/exterior_image_1_left.comment: DROID exterior camera (over_shoulder_left). Third-person scene view; first by camera-order convention (maps to the policy's primary/exterior slot). Native 720x1280, aspect-preserving downscaled (long edge capped at 640) by the bridge — NO square squash, so the policy's resize_with_pad to 224 stays distortion-free. Shape is advisory (the agent reads the real array shape); dtype 'image' is the runtime sentinel; the wire payload is uint8 HWC RGB.

observation/wrist_image_left.comment: DROID wrist camera (Robotiq base_link/wrist_cam, focal 2.8 — calibrated to pi05/DreamZero). Native 720x1280, aspect-preserving downscaled (long edge capped at 640) by the bridge — NO square squash; the policy resize_with_pads to 224. Shape is advisory; wire payload is uint8 HWC RGB.

observation/state.comment: Joint-space proprio (RoboLab ProprioceptionObservationCfg arm_joint_pos + gripper_pos): elems 0-6 are 7 Panda arm joints (REAL rad), elem 7 is the gripper opening (state_representation NORM01: 0=open, 1=closed, dimensionless). All JOINT_ABS_POS, so kept as one runtime feature; the per-quantity split (arm REAL vs gripper NORM01) is spelled out in demos/contracts/envs/droid.json. Normalization is policy-side (null).

action.comment: Optional branch: RoboLab DroidRelIKActionCfg (differential IK, use_relative_mode pose, scale 0.5, body_name=base_link). Elems 0-2 = delta position (XYZ m), 3-5 = delta orientation (OPEN: euler XYZ droll/dpitch/dyaw per IsaacLab relative-pose convention; rad), 6 = binary gripper (NORM01). Selected by --control ee_del.

comment: RoboLab (NVIDIA Isaac Lab) DROID embodiment: Franka Panda (7-DoF, arm7g1) + Robotiq 2F-85, ~15 Hz (sim dt 1/120, decimation 8), differential-IK relative pose control (DroidRelIKActionCfg, use_relative_mode, scale 0.5, body_name=base_link). Runtime contract: same structure as the libero/simpler wire contracts, enriched with the spec_v0 semantic layer. mean/std null: normalization is policy-side. One complete contract per control mode (spec_v0 §5): --control ee_del selects this file; siblings: robolab_joint_pos.json (default), robolab_ee_abs.json.
